misc.title: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves
misc.text: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves symbolism. KawaSara is possible to become the canon ship… #BORUTO

misc.title: And before you start saying I am an ungrateful person: I’m not, I just want something more for the 10 years anniversary. I swear Dasiens Manga animations back then were better than this lol
